nodes.label: The Crushing Harmonic
nodes.description: Maximum heaviness with maximum beauty. Three-part vocal harmonics over crushing noise-rock riffs through Verellen amplifiers. The paradox generates E=6. Neither element compromises -- both at full intensity simultaneously. The defining acoustic signature of Helms Alee.

nodes.label: Three Voices -- Angelic Harmonics Over Noise
nodes.description: All three members sing. Ben Verellen, Dana James, Hozoji Matheson-Margullis -- three voices in angelic harmony, unison screaming, call-and-response, or layered combinations. Unprecedented in heavy music. The vocal dimension that sets Helms Alee apart from all other noise rock.

nodes.label: Verellen Amplifiers -- Builder and Player Unified
nodes.description: Ben Verellen designs and hand-builds boutique tube amplifiers. The amps Helms Alee plays through are the amps Verellen builds. Instrument-maker and instrument-user are the same person. Tone engineered from circuit board up. In the lineage of Fender, Marshall, Mesa/Boogie -- but Verellen is unique: builder and player unified.

nodes.label: E=6 Sustained Corridor (107-111)
nodes.description: Fourth E=6 in five degrees. Veronica Lipgloss (108), No Anchor (109), Kinski (110), Helms Alee (111). Unprecedented density at maximum. Prior: one E=6 in 107 degrees (Hendrix at 36). Now: four in five. The engine at sustained peak energy.

nodes.label: Capitol Hill Heavy Lineage
nodes.description: Capitol Hill's heavy music tradition: Melvins (sludge), Kinski (110, instrumental), Hovercraft (91, drone), Big Business (sludge/noise). Helms Alee synthesizes the tradition. Second consecutive Capitol Hill act at E=6 (110-111). Beginning of Capitol Hill corridor (110-115).

nodes.label: Amplifier Lineage -- Hendrix to Verellen
nodes.description: Hendrix (degree 36, E=6) played through Marshall stacks. Verellen builds the next generation of high-powered amplifiers. A literal hardware lineage from the first E=6 to the fifth. Builder and player, unified in one person at degree 111.

cross_references.relationship: CONSECUTIVE CAPITOL HILL E=6. Both Capitol Hill, both E=6, both heavy. Kinski is instrumental and expansive; Helms Alee is vocal and paradoxical. Two consecutive Capitol Hill acts at maximum energy.
E=6 CORRIDOR. Fourth E=6 in five degrees. Punk/electronic combustion (108) and noise/beauty paradox (111). Different sources of maximum energy.
HEAVY SEATTLE VOLUME. Both noise-adjacent, both overwhelming volume. Hovercraft: instrumental drone (E=4). Helms Alee: vocal, structured, paradoxically beautiful (E=6).
E=6 AND AMPLIFIER LINEAGE. Hendrix played Marshall stacks. Verellen builds the next generation. Builder-and-player unified. E=6 from degree 36 to degree 111.
SEATTLE HEAVY TRADITION. Both heavy, both Seattle. Pearl Jam fills arenas at E=5. Helms Alee detonates venues at E=6.
